hooks.command: if [ -d "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.handoffs/inbox" ]; then in_count=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.handoffs/inbox/"*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$in_count" -gt 0 ]; then echo "📬 $in_count brief(s) in .handoffs/inbox/ — run /inbox"; fi; fi; if [ -d "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.handoffs/archive" ]; then recent=$(find "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.handoffs/archive/" -name "*.md" -mtime -1 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$recent" -gt 0 ]; then echo "📨 $recent recent archive completion(s) (last 24h) — run /archive to view"; fi; fi
